MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Whitecliff I Apartments Ltd. is present. Represented by Algandra laflam.
Attorney Ryan Mayberry appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Alexis Riley is present.
Attorney Alex Christopher representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Zadik Shapiro, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of APR-02-2012 is vacated. (501/REQ)
